backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with user profile management, booking request submission, and admin-only paginated retrieval of requests, all protected by role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for build verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of each frontend source file describing their purpose, styling theme, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark modes used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card metadata, and favicon all branded for Avsarvatika marriage hall.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order, handles authentication state, profile setup dialog, admin view toggling, and package selection scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReque: Admin view that fetches and displays paginated booking requests as cards, showing contact details, event info, and submission timestamps with prev/next page controls.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during the login process and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and saves it via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation; cannot be dismissed without submitting.
frontend/src/components/BookingRequestFo: A form component for submitting event booking requests, with fields for name, phone, email, event date/type, guests, package, and message, including client-side validation and mutation via useSubmitBookingRequest.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: Landing page 'About' section displaying four feature cards (Excellence, Personalized Service, Trusted Venue, Premium Quality) with icons and a brand description paragraph.
frontend/src/components/sections/Banquet: Landing page 'Banquet' section showcasing venue features (capacity, catering, AV, ambiance) in a grid layout alongside four key statistics (guests, years, events, support).
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Renders a contact and booking section with phone, email, address info, WhatsApp CTA buttons, and an embedded BookingRequestForm component.
frontend/src/components/sections/DecorSe: Displays a decoration services section with four themed cards (Floral Elegance, Custom Themes, Stage & Mandap, Lighting Design) and a closing tagline block.
frontend/src/components/sections/EventSe: Shows a grid of four event types the venue hosts (weddings, birthdays, engagements, anniversaries) with icons, descriptions, and a 'Most Popular' badge on weddings.
frontend/src/components/sections/Facilit: Lists venue facilities across four categories (Venue Features, Amenities, Services, Outdoor Spaces) using Card components with checkmark list items.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Implements a filterable image gallery with category buttons and a lightbox dialog supporting previous/next navigation for full-screen image viewing.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Minimal full-screen hero section that displays a single full-bleed background image of the decorated marriage hall stage.
frontend/src/components/sections/Package: Renders three pricing package cards (Classic, Premium, Luxury) with feature lists, prices, a 'Most Popular' badge, and WhatsApp inquiry and package-select action buttons.
frontend/src/components/sections/Seminar: Presents corporate event facilities (AV setup, Wi-Fi, refreshments, event management) in a grid alongside three stat highlights for seating capacity, configurations, and booking options.
frontend/src/components/sections/Special: Renders a section showcasing four specialist roles (Event Coordinators, AV Technicians, Wedding Planners, Culinary Experts) with icons and descriptions in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Displays a grid of six client testimonials with star ratings, quote text, and avatar initials for the Avsarvatika marriage hall.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Site footer component displaying the brand logo, quick navigation links, and contact info (address, phone, WhatsApp, email) with smooth-scroll navigation support.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky site header with desktop and mobile (sheet drawer) navigation menus, smooth-scroll anchor links, and an admin click handler prop.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports a frozen BRAND constant containing the business name, tagline, phone, WhatsApp, email, and address for Avsarvatika marriage hall.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend operations including fetching/saving user profiles, checking admin status, submitting booking requests, and paginating booking requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines a greenery-themed CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, fonts, shadows, and accordion animations. Includes the typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Avsar Vatika Marriage Hall website project, recording completed features (navigation links, page sections, WhatsApp contacts, venue address) and pending feature requests with their requirement IDs and statuses.
